sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34244" key="e)mpaste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμ-παστέον</orth>, <sense id="n34244.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must sprinkle</tr_>, Arching. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
